description_long: This rifle features a robust, utilitarian design with a metallic body and a skeletonized folding stock, suggesting portability and ease of storage. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with visible colored bands and a muzzle device at the tip, likely for flash suppression or recoil reduction. The receiver area is detailed with a prominent magazine well and a detachable box magazine, as well as a visible trigger and trigger guard. The handguard and fore-end are reinforced, possibly with polymer or wrapped material for grip and heat resistance. Iron sights are mounted along the top, providing basic aiming capability. The overall finish is matte with a mix of dark brown, green, and metallic tones, giving it a rugged, military-inspired appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, metallic rifle with a folding skeleton stock, long barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, finished in matte earth tones.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the handguard and stock behind it.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the folding skeleton stock, detachable box magazine, trigger assembly, and colored barrel bands.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the stock and magazine are prominent, with the barrel extending directly away from the viewer.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the same key features as view 1, with additional detail on the magazine and receiver.
